orderItems.message:
David,
I hope this e-card brings a big, warm smile to your face. I love you, and I know how much you adore these litte dogs, and how much you miss Max. I have made a donation to Little Paws Dachsund Rescue in honor of this big birthday. I'm looking forward to celebrating it with you.
Love, Melisa

orderItems.message:
Dear Don and Violette,

Sending you both happy holiday wishes.  We are all doing well especially our wonderful boy Chewie who was a Little Paws Dachshund Rescue dog.  I hope you are both healthy and enjoy the season.

Love to you both,
Cathy, Michael, and Chewie

Dear Pattie and Marc,

Wishing you both a very Happy Chanukah.  We are doing great and have a new family member.  Chewie is a dachshund rescue from Little Paws Dachshund Rescue.  I also volunteer for the Rescue and really enjoy it.  Michael is keeping busy with volunteer work too.  

Hope to see you both in the New Year.  Wouldn't that be great.

Love to you both,
Cathy and Michael

Happy Valentines Day today!!   Hope you, Roxy, Coco and Sofie have a happy day!!  This little girl on the e-card was a foster of mine! She came from a rural shelter in NC and living her best life in a beachfront home with a retired couple in Lusby, MD!    Hearts to you, Karen, Emelie and the pack!!
